context.description: A philosophical nonfiction passage discusses the limits of identifying archetypal patterns such as the hero's journey in real life. It shifts toward the theme of human planning as a distinctive trait and introduces a transition into that topic.
normalization_notes: Translated German visible text into English control-language summary.
Book title inferred from source file name.

rows.paragraph_text: Philosophical discussion of the difficulty of diagnosing archetypal journeys in real life, contrasted with their clear recognition in myths. The passage argues that human planning is a defining trait and uses it as a transition into the next theme.
